svg.text: • 23. Merge k Sorted Lists — heap of head pointers
• 88. Merge Sorted Array — k=2 special case (in-place from the back)
• 21. Merge Two Sorted Lists — k=2 base case
• 264. Ugly Number II — three lists 2x, 3x, 5x merged with dedup
• 313. Super Ugly Number — generalised k primes merge
• 1675. Minimize Deviation in Array — heap with even/odd transformation
• 378. Kth Smallest in a Sorted Matrix — rows as sorted lists
• 373. K Smallest Pairs — virtual list pair-grid with neighbour expansion
• 632. Smallest Range Covering Elements from K Lists — frontier heap
• 786. Kth Smallest Prime Fraction — merge of fraction streams
• 668. Kth Smallest in Multiplication Table — virtual sorted rows
• 719. Find K-th Smallest Pair Distance — distance generator + binary search
If sorted streams are present, k-way merge with a heap is the default.
